{{Infobox technique
| name = Absolute Burial
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

''See also: [[Absolute Burial Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Absolute Burial is a high-level pinnacle sealing spell used to subdue targets instantly and non-lethally. The magic functions by locking away every facet of a victim, including their physical power, mental thoughts, and connection to the [[Aether]]. The spell manifests through a spell-anchor, which appears as a hovering, spinning sphere composed of overlapping white seals or magical circles. This anchor can be used to imprison various entities, such as the unborn [[Iron King]], clones, or an ancient lich. While it serves as a powerful method of containment, the spell can fail, and its anchor has been known to release darkness or be destroyed by [[elementalism]]. In some instances, the spell-anchor has been placed within highly secure vaults or specialized glass columns to ensure the prisoner cannot escape.}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Absolute Burial is a pinnacle sealing, [[binding]], and restriction spell cast by the narrator that is powered by [[Eurias]]. Contained within a torpedo, the spell surrounds its target with swirling white discs of [[Aetheric sigils]] and glowing circles. This magic carries a subject out of reality into an isolated pocket of [[Subspace]], utilizing an anchor of darkness. The spell's white anchor consists of a twisting ball of symbols that gleams like a small moon, and it has previously been successful against a [[King of the Iron Legion]].}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Absolute Burial]] is a sealing spell that surrounds its target with swirling white discs of [[Aetheric sigils]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c3">''The Captain'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Absolute Burial]] spell carries its target out of reality and into an isolated pocket of [[Subspace]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Absolute Burial]] spell has an anchor that is a ball of twisted white seals.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Absolute Burial]] spell was contained within a torpedo.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Absolute Burial]] is a pinnacle sealing spell.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c8">''The Captain'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Absolute Burial]] has a white spell-anchor that gleams like a small moon.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c9">''The Captain'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Absolute Burial]] is a [[binding]] and restriction spell involving glowing circles.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c14">''The Captain'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Absolute Burial]] has previously worked against a [[King of the Iron Legion]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Absolute Burial]] is a spell cast by the narrator.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c23">''The Captain'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Absolute Burial]] is an anchor of darkness.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Absolute Burial]] is powered by [[Eurias]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c46">''The Captain'', chapter 46</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Absolute Burial]] is anchored by a twisting ball of white symbols.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c46" />}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Absolute Burial]] is a technique used to seal targets.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c23">''The Engineer'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Absolute Burial]] is a technique that can lock [[Parryl]] away.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c11">''The Knight'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Absolute Burial]] is a technique mentioned by [[Varic]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c44">''The Knight'', chapter 44</ref>}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Absolute Burial]] is a spell consisting of a ball of overlapping white magic circles used to seal entities.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c8">''The Pilot'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Absolute Burial]] is a spell used by [[Varic]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c29">''The Pilot'', chapter 29</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Absolute Burial]] is a spell that can be crushed.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c44">''The Pilot'', chapter 44</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|When Varic finally said “Absolute Burial,” Omega was disappointed.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c29" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
